languages.text: Кое-как балансируя между ордой вопящих культистов и дисциплинированной армией, меровцы еще некоторое время оставались крупнейшей армией-культом в Просторе Коронус, прежде чем внутренние дрязги положили конец печально известному полку.

Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.
languages.original_text: Кое-как балансируя между ордой вопящих культистов и дисциплинированной армией, меровцы еще некоторое время оставались крупнейшей армией-культом в Просторе Коронус, прежде чем внутренние дрязги положили конец печально известному полку.

traits.locale_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

languages.text: 狂信者集団と軍隊の狭間をさまよい、メロヴィアンはしばらくの間、コーロナス・エクスパンションで最も大きな武装集団であり続けた。しかし、内部の争いがその悪名高い連隊を終わらせるまで。
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

traits.locale_text: 狂信者集団と軍隊の狭間をさまよい、メロヴィアンはしばらくの間、コーロナス・エクスパンションで最も大きな武装集団であり続けた。しかし、内部の争いがその悪名高い連隊を終わらせるまで。

languages.text: 梅罗夫人一度是科罗努斯扩区最大的武装教派。他们始终踩在狂啸的邪教徒与纪律严明的军队之间那条微妙的分界线上，直到内部冲突终结了这支臭名昭著的军团。
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

traits.locale_text: 梅罗夫人一度是科罗努斯扩区最大的武装教派。他们始终踩在狂啸的邪教徒与纪律严明的军队之间那条微妙的分界线上，直到内部冲突终结了这支臭名昭著的军团。

languages.text: En équilibre précaire entre une horde de cultistes déments et une armée disciplinée, les Meroviens demeurèrent la plus grande secte armée des Étendues de Koronus pendant un temps, jusqu'à ce que des conflits internes mènent le régiment à sa perte.
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

traits.locale_text: En équilibre précaire entre une horde de cultistes déments et une armée disciplinée, les Meroviens demeurèrent la plus grande secte armée des Étendues de Koronus pendant un temps, jusqu'à ce que des conflits internes mènent le régiment à sa perte.

languages.text: En la delgada línea entre una horda de cultistas delirantes y un ejército disciplinado, los merovianos se mantuvieron como el culto armado de mayor tamaño en la Extensión de Koronus durante un tiempo, hasta que las luchas internas pusieron fin al infame regimiento.
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

traits.locale_text: En la delgada línea entre una horda de cultistas delirantes y un ejército disciplinado, los merovianos se mantuvieron como el culto armado de mayor tamaño en la Extensión de Koronus durante un tiempo, hasta que las luchas internas pusieron fin al infame regimiento.

languages.text: Uluyan tarikatçılardan oluşan bir sürü olmakla disiplinli bir ordu olmak arasındaki ince çizgide yürüyen Merovlular, iç çatışmalar kötü şöhretli alayın sonunu getirmeden önce bir süre Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en büyük silahlı tarikat olarak kaldı.
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.

traits.locale_text: Uluyan tarikatçılardan oluşan bir sürü olmakla disiplinli bir ordu olmak arasındaki ince çizgide yürüyen Merovlular, iç çatışmalar kötü şöhretli alayın sonunu getirmeden önce bir süre Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en büyük silahlı tarikat olarak kaldı.

languages.text: Auf einem schmalen Grat zwischen einer Horde brüllender Kultisten und einer disziplinierten Armee blieben die Merovianer der größte bewaffnete Kult der Koronus-Ausdehnung, ehe innere Streitigkeiten das Ende des verrufenen Regiments herbeiführten.
languages.original_text: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.
